title: Deori Khās Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Deori Khās with a Z-Score of +5.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Deori Khās is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 16.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 23%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 18.4 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, causing significant disruptions to daily life and activities.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
